analysis.summary_en: Highly unusual divergence: TAIEX is down 1.63% intraday yet large-cap tech names (2330, 2454, 3711, 2303) are sharply higher with 0050 ETF up 4.53%. The data appears internally inconsistent — index print shows session low equal to close while constituents are strongly green. Treating with skepticism, but if the single-stock prints are real, this looks like a tech-led squeeze (TSMC +6.56%, MediaTek limit-up +9.96%, ASE +9.83%) against a weak broader tape. ADR-local divergences of -5% to -8% suggest local prices ran far ahead of overnight US ADR moves — classic sign of either a delayed local catch-up rally on a Taiwan-specific catalyst or stale/inconsistent data.
analysis.summary_zh: 盤面數據出現異常分歧:加權指數下跌1.63%,但大型科技股(台積電、聯發科、日月光投控、聯電)卻強勢上漲,0050 ETF更漲4.53%。指數收在當日最低且與成分股表現嚴重背離,數據一致性存疑。若個股報價屬實,顯示科技股軋空走勢與大盤疲弱並存(台積電+6.56%、聯發科漲停+9.96%、日月光+9.83%)。ADR與台股價差達-5%至-8%,顯示本地股價遠超隔夜ADR表現,可能反映台股獨有催化劑的延遲補漲,或數據不一致。

key_stories.headline_en: Massive ADR-local divergence across semis (TSMC -5.57pp, UMC -5.59pp, ASE -7.65pp)
key_stories.headline_zh: 半導體ADR與台股價差顯著擴大(台積電-5.57pp、聯電-5.59pp、日月光-7.65pp)
key_stories.analysis_en: Local semis are up multiples of their ADR moves overnight. This pattern usually signals one of: (1) a Taiwan-specific catalyst hit during local hours (e.g., TSMC pricing/capex/AI order news, or a government support measure), (2) heavy foreign or local institutional buy program, or (3) a short squeeze on names that had been pressed. With MediaTek and ASE printing limit-up moves, squeeze characteristics are present. The fact that TAIEX is still negative while heavyweights rip suggests broad financials/old-economy weakness offsetting — consistent with a rotation, not a broad risk-on day. Wife should not chase limit-up names; ADRs will reprice tonight and arbitrage typically closes within 1-2 sessions.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 本地半導體股漲幅遠超ADR隔夜表現。此模式通常意味:(1)台股交易時段出現台灣本地催化劑(如台積電定價/資本支出/AI訂單消息或政策利多);(2)外資或內資大單買盤;(3)空頭回補軋空。聯發科與日月光出現漲停價,符合軋空特徵。加權指數仍下跌而權值股飆漲,顯示金融與傳產走弱抵銷,屬於資金輪動而非全面risk-on。建議不追漲停股;ADR今晚將重新定價,套利價差通常1-2個交易日內收斂。

key_stories.headline_en: Huawei targets US$12B AI chip sales as China seeks Nvidia alternatives
key_stories.headline_zh: 華為瞄準120億美元AI晶片銷售,中國尋求輝達替代方案
key_stories.analysis_en: Mild long-term negative for TSMC China revenue exposure (already restricted) but near-term immaterial — Huawei production is constrained by SMIC capacity, not demand. Should not be driving a +6.56% TSMC move; if anything it's a slight headwind. This story does not explain today's tape.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 對台積電中國營收長期略偏空(該業務已受出口管制),但近期影響有限——華為產能受制於中芯國際,非需求問題。此消息無法解釋台積電+6.56%走勢,反而略偏空。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Local ran 5.57pp ahead of ADR. Either ADR catches up tonight (likely if a real Taiwan-hours catalyst exists) or 2330.TW gives back tomorrow. Watch TSM open in NY for the tell. Falsifier: if TSM opens flat-to-down, expect 2330.TW pullback at next open.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 台股領先ADR 5.57pp。今晚ADR可能補漲(若確有台股時段催化劑),或台積電明日回吐。觀察TSM紐約開盤定調。反向訊號:若TSM開平或下跌,預期2330.TW次日回檔。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ASE Holdings limit-up locally vs ADR +2.18%. Largest divergence in the set. Limit-up mechanics distort comparison (local can't print higher), so ADR may close part of gap tonight rather than local fully reverting.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 日月光投控本地漲停而ADR僅+2.18%,為最大價差。漲停機制扭曲比較(本地無法再漲),今晚ADR可能補漲收斂部分價差,而非本地完全回吐。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Himax ADR -6.09% but local 3504.TW +1.9% — opposite directions. This is a genuine arbitrage signal; local likely sells off next session unless company-specific Taiwan news offsets. Falsifier: a positive local press release or analyst upgrade specific to 3504.TW.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 奇景ADR下跌6.09%,但本地3504.TW卻上漲1.9%,方向相反。屬真實套利訊號,若無台股端利多,本地次日可能補跌。反向訊號:3504.TW出現正面公司新聞或分析師調升評等。

analysis.no_signals_note: Data quality caveat: TAIEX -1.63% with 0050 ETF +4.53% and top constituents sharply higher is mathematically inconsistent. Recommend verifying prints against a second source before acting on any flagged trade. Confidence on directional reads is intentionally lowered.
